pr_text:
## Title: Add missing periodicityAndOffset for CSI-IM resources per 3GPP spec

### Summary
The CSI-IM resource configuration function `config_csiim()` was missing the `periodicityAndOffset` field, which is conditionally mandatory per 3GPP TS 38.331. For periodic CSI-IM resources, this field must be present to define the measurement timing. The absence of this field could cause RRC configuration failures or UE compatibility issues when the gNB configures periodic CSI-IM resources for interference
